title: Paphos, Paphos District — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Paphos, Paphos District: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Paphos is a city in Paphos District with a population of 66,000. The mythical birthplace of Aphrodite, a UNESCO World Heritage site with stunning Roman mosaics, a picturesque harbor, and a beautiful coastline.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
